analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**Best CSP:**
PLTR $125 strike, 2026-06-18 expiry, 41 DTE, $3.70/$3.85 bid/ask, 0.26 delta, 26.9% annualized return
- High IVP (74%), quality pullback, strong momentum setup

**Best CC:**
GOOGL $420 strike, 2026-06-18 expiry, 41 DTE, $8.80/$9.10 bid/ask, 0.33 delta, 20.0% annualized return
- Profit position, reasonable strike distance, solid premium

**Best LEAPS:**
None qualify - all showing extended above MA50 or expensive IVP (MSFT at 91% IVP too high for LEAPS entry)

**Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available in current scan

**IVP Environment:**
Mixed volatility landscape - growth names (PLTR 74%, NFLX 85%) offering premium opportunities while mega-caps expensive (MSFT 91%, NVDA 84%, AAPL 74%) - favor CSPs over LEAPS purchases.
